en: Hey, Robbie. Coach Stan. What are you doing here?
I came to see if everything was okay. We missed your tryouts today.
ko: 모든 게 괜찮은지 보러 왔어. 오늘 너의 트라이아웃을 놓쳤어.

en: I had some stuff I had to do. Look, Robbie, you're good. What's up?
You're gonna have scouts lined up to give you a full ride today.
ko: 오늘 너에게 장학금을 주려고 스카우트들이 줄 서 있을 거야.

en: You just gonna throw that all away? What are you, my dad now? Cut.
Sorry, guys. Stay in the zone. Hey, basketball players? What's up?
So right now, you're just sort of passing back and forth. Looks a little bit weird.
ko: 지금 그냥 서로 패스만 하고 있어. 좀 이상해 보여.

en: Just play basketball. You know what I mean? Just dribble, pass, run some plays, okay?
All right, sir. Thank you. Sorry, guys. Taking it from the top.
What are you doing here? I came to see if everything was okay.
We missed your tryouts today. Yeah, I, uh... I had some stuff I had to do.
Look, Robbie, you're good. You're gonna have scouts lined up
ko: 오늘 너에게 장학금을 주려고 스카우트들이 줄 서 있을 거야.

en: waiting to give you a full ride to their schools,
ko: 오늘 너에게 장학금을 주려고 스카우트들이 줄 서 있을 거야.
